## Validation Checklist
- [ ] targeted validation was run at the same level as the change
- [ ] outputs or receipts were inspected directly, not assumed
- [ ] any skipped validation is explained below

## Docs Update Checklist
- [ ] `docs/implementation/STATUS.md`
- [ ] `docs/implementation/00-master-roadmap.md`
- [ ] `docs/implementation/08-docs-contract.md`
- [ ] owning workstream doc(s) under `docs/implementation/01-07`
- [ ] paired research doc(s) under `docs/research/` when truth or framing changed
- [ ] operator or repo guidance docs such as `docs/README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, or `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] no doc updates were needed, and the reason is stated below

## Review Checklist
- [ ] subagent review requested for non-trivial code or workflow changes
- [ ] review findings were addressed or explicitly rejected with reason
- [ ] no hallucinated result claims; changed outputs, files, or receipts were checked directly
